description: Lifecycle governance for templates/common — L1 base layer propagated to all co-* variants

history.note: Lifecycle governance established for templates/common at v1.0.0
Updated for frontmatter merge migration - governance inheritance confirmed
validate-templates.ts v1.4.0: 4 new check functions added (VA-01, VA-02, VA-03, WS-03); new-project scripts v1.3.6/v1.5.8 now invoke post-scaffolding variant validation

Agent Teams (Experimental) section propagated to all 4 variant CLAUDE.md files; Agent Teams vs. Antigravity Agent Manager section propagated to all 4 variant GEMINI.md files. Reflects new hooks: TeammateIdle, TaskCompleted added to .claude/settings.json and templates/common/.claude/settings.json

common-contract.json v1.1.0: added platform_settings section (SSOT for settings parity). All 8 variant .claude/settings.json and .gemini/settings.json updated with shared hooks (SessionStart, PostToolUse). CLAUDE.md + GEMINI.md §10 lifecycle tables updated. validate-templates.ts v1.4.2: added VA-04 check + getNestedKey helper.

templates/common/.gemini/settings.json created (shared items: mcpServers, SessionStart, PostToolUse hooks). propagation-map.json: added gemini-settings domain. publish-to-template.ts v1.3.0: added --docs flag + publishDocs() + extractCommonSections() + replaceCommonSection(). validate-templates.ts v1.4.2: added VA-05 checkDocumentCommonSections + extractMarkedSections helper. .claude/settings.json (root + common + 4 variants): added asyncRewake, effortLevel, permissions.deny, WorktreeCreate hook; root also got worktree.bgIsolation. CLAUDE.md + GEMINI.md (root + 4 variants each): added COMMON-CLAUDE:START/END and COMMON-GEMINI:START/END markers.

co-consult variant (strategy consulting) added at v1.0.0 stable. 13 variant-specific skills created in templates/co-consult/.claude/skills/ and .gemini/skills/: competitive-intelligence, financial-modeling, insight-synthesis, stakeholder-alignment, org-readiness-assessment, change-impact-assessment, narrative-framework, consulting-report-writing, executive-presentation, solution-design, technical-feasibility, project-delivery, stakeholder-review-management. VERSION_REGISTRY.json: co-consult entry confirmed stable 1.0.0.

Wave 1 Critical fixes completed (A-01 through A-05): A-01 co-consult .gitignore updated (added .git/ entry); A-02 Mojibake fixed in 11 variant CLAUDE.md/GEMINI.md files (all 5 variants + 4 agent pm.md files + co-develop README.md); A-03 co-consult AGENTS.md PM Dispatch + Skills tables fixed; A-04 co-consult CLAUDE.md §5 Specialist Agent List fixed; A-05 co-develop README.md agent table fixed. All fixes were documentation corrections (encoding, formatting) - no version bump required.

Wave 2 High Priority fixes completed (H-04+H-05, H-09): H-04+H-05 added TaskCompleted hook and timeout=60 to 6 template .claude/settings.json files (templates/common/, co-design/, co-develop/, co-work/, co-security/, co-consult/); H-09 pinned @colbymchenry/codegraph to version @0.9.7 and removed -y flag across 16 .claude/settings.json files and 4 setup scripts. Both fixes improve security posture - no version bump required (structural + supply-chain security fixes).
